Bash(# Copy all files from tmp to the target directory, excluding node_modules and git
cp -r /e/projetos/flyerlocal_tmp/app /e/projetos/End_Flyer/

cp /e/projetos/flyerlocal_tmp/package.json /e/projetos/End_Flyer/

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''pdfjs-dist:'''', d.get\(''''dependencies'''',{}\).get\(''''pdfjs-dist'''',''''not found''''\)\); print\(''''devDeps pdfjs:'''', d.get\(''''devDependencies'''',{}\).get\(''''pdfjs-dist'''',''''not found''''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''./package.json''\); console.log\(''pdfjs dep:'', d.dependencies?.[''pdfjs-dist'']||''not found''\); console.log\(''pdfjs devDep:'', d.devDependencies?.[''pdfjs-dist'']||''not found''\)")
